about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Born on the streets. Built for the ride.
about.story1: URBAN RIDE was founded in 2018 by a group of cyclists who believed that every ride should be an adventure. We started in a small garage in Portland, Oregon, with one mission: build bikes that make you want to keep riding.
about.story2: Our bikes blend cutting-edge engineering with raw, urban aesthetics. Every frame is designed to handle anything — from potholed city streets to mountain switchbacks. We don't just sell bikes; we build machines for exploration.
about.story3: Today, URBAN RIDE ships to riders in over 30 countries. Our community of urban adventurers, mountain shredders, and electric pioneers grows every day. Join the ride.
about.value1Desc: Every bike undergoes 147-point inspection before it reaches your door.
about.value2Desc: We listen to our community. Your feedback shapes every bike we build.
about.value3Desc: Carbon-neutral shipping and recycled packaging. Fast doesn't have to mean wasteful.
